task_completion.description: Agent successfully logs into the Rancher dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser shows the Rancher UI dashboard at https://localhost after successful authentication.
Rancher UI shows the 'dev-all-access' ClusterRoleBinding being deleted, or its configuration screen showing the removal of the 'cluster-admin' role from the 'dev-automation' ServiceAccount.

task_completion.description: Agent remediates the 'wildcard-staging-role' Role in the staging namespace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI shows the 'wildcard-staging-role' being edited to replace wildcard (*) permissions with specific, restricted verbs and resources.
Rancher UI shows the 'monitoring-cluster-admin' ClusterRoleBinding being deleted, or edited to remove the 'cluster-admin' role from the 'metrics-collector' ServiceAccount.

task_completion.description: Agent remediates the 'ci-elevated-access' RoleBinding in the staging namespace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI shows the 'ci-elevated-access' RoleBinding being deleted, or edited to remove the 'cluster-admin' role from the 'ci-runner' ServiceAccount.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rancher GUI to perform the audit and remediations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation, inspection, and form submissions within the Rancher web interface, rather than bypassing the UI requirement entirely.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply type the expected answers or commands into a text editor to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed in the actual Rancher application or a genuine terminal, not a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent manually identifies and remediates the roles/bindings rather than running a pre-existing solution script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Trajectory shows the agent browsing RBAC resources, inspecting permissions, and applying changes step-by-step.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires remediating 4 specific injected RBAC violations: 1) ClusterRoleBinding 'dev-all-access' (SA dev-automation in development bound to cluster-admin), 2) Role 'wildcard-staging-role' in staging (uses * for verbs/resources/apiGroups), 3) ClusterRoleBinding 'monitoring-cluster-admin' (SA metrics-collector in monitoring bound to cluster-admin), 4) RoleBinding 'ci-elevated-access' in staging (SA ci-runner bound to cluster-admin). A passing score requires at least 3 of these 4 violations to be successfully remediated.
